title: AI Freelancer Proposal Assistant
problem: Freelancers spend significant time writing repetitive proposals while struggling to personalize applications and maintain consistency across different client requirements.
description: Designed and developed a production-style AI-powered proposal generation platform that automates job analysis, proposal generation, pricing recommendations, AI-based proposal review, proposal history management, dashboard analytics, and version-controlled proposal editing.
responsibilities: Built a FastAPI backend using layered architecture
Developed a React and TypeScript frontend
Integrated Gemini API for proposal generation
Created evaluation framework for proposal benchmarking
Implemented SQLite database with repository pattern
Developed dashboard analytics and proposal management
technical_solution: Implemented a modular FastAPI backend using service and repository patterns, integrated Gemini API with prompt engineering, developed a React frontend, and added semantic retrieval using embeddings for contextual proposal generation.
architecture: React → FastAPI → Application Services → Agent Orchestrator → AI Agents → Retrieval Service → Repository Layer → SQLite
business_impact: Reduced manual proposal writing effort by automating proposal creation while improving consistency, personalization, and overall workflow efficiency.
results: Built a complete AI SaaS MVP
Developed evaluation framework for proposal quality

title: Analytics Dashboard
problem: Businesses require a centralized platform to monitor KPIs and make data-driven decisions from multiple metrics.
description: Developed an interactive analytics dashboard for monitoring business metrics, KPIs, and operational performance through visual reports.
technical_solution: Built a responsive dashboard using React with dynamic visualizations and Python-based analytics processing.
architecture: React Frontend → Analytics API → Python Backend
business_impact: Enabled easier monitoring of business performance through centralized analytics.

title: Smart Turf Booking Platform
problem: Sports facilities often rely on manual booking processes, leading to scheduling conflicts and inefficient resource management.
description: Developed a full-stack sports facility booking platform supporting scheduling workflows, booking management, backend APIs, and responsive user interfaces.
technical_solution: Built a React frontend with FastAPI backend for booking management, scheduling, and API-driven operations.
business_impact: Simplified sports facility booking and reduced scheduling conflicts.

title: Financial Market Analytics Dashboard
problem: Financial data from multiple sources is difficult to analyze efficiently without centralized reporting.
description: Developed dashboards for analyzing financial markets, KPIs, business trends, and investment insights using Python, SQL, Excel, and Power BI.
technical_solution: Integrated Python, SQL, Excel, and Power BI for automated financial analysis and reporting.
architecture: Data Sources → SQL → Python → Power BI
business_impact: Improved visibility into financial performance and investment trends.

title: Interactive Analytics Dashboard
problem: Users need an intuitive interface for monitoring proposals, KPIs, and workflow progress.
description: Designed responsive dashboards featuring proposal history, KPI visualization, workflow tracking, and interactive analytics.
technical_solution: Developed a modern analytics dashboard using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
business_impact: Improved user experience through a modern analytics interface.

title: AI-Powered Chatbot
problem: Organizations require automated customer support capable of answering user queries efficiently.
description: Developed an AI-powered chatbot using Gemini API to provide intelligent customer support through natural language understanding and response generation.
technical_solution: Integrated LLM APIs with backend services to provide conversational AI capabilities.
business_impact: Reduced manual customer support effort through AI-driven conversations.
